scripts.test:demo:e2e:emu: pnpm exec firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.json --project demo-vibe-rtc --only firestore,auth "CI=1 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-vibe-rtc VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=demo-api-key VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:1234567890:web:demo VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=1234567890 pnpm test:demo:e2e"
scripts.test:demo:predeploy:emu: pnpm --filter @vibe-rtc/demo run test && pnpm test:demo:e2e:emu && pnpm test:e2e:emu
scripts.test:e2e:takeover: bash ./scripts/free-port.sh 5175 && CI=1 pnpm --filter @vibe-rtc/rtc-e2e exec playwright test --project=chromium --grep takeover
scripts.test:e2e:real:smoke: bash ./scripts/free-port.sh 5175 && CI=1 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST= FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST= VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST= VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST= pnpm --filter @vibe-rtc/rtc-e2e exec playwright test --project=chromium --grep "caller reload recovers within SLA and message flow survives|caller takeover makes new caller active and old caller inactive|new dx: caller auto-creates invite, callee joins by invite, reload resumes by invite|takeover: new caller becomes active, previous caller is disconnected with takeover signal"
scripts.test:e2e:real:full: CI=1 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST= FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST= VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST= VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST= pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:real:takeover: CI=1 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST= FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST= VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST= VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST= pnpm test:e2e:takeover
scripts.test:e2e:emu: pnpm exec firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.json --project demo-vibe-rtc --only firestore,auth "CI=1 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-vibe-rtc VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=demo-api-key VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:1234567890:web:demo VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=1234567890 pnpm test:e2e"
scripts.test:e2e:emu:takeover: pnpm exec firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.json --project demo-vibe-rtc --only firestore,auth "CI=1 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-vibe-rtc VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=demo-api-key VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:1234567890:web:demo VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=1234567890 pnpm test:e2e:takeover"
scripts.test:rules:emu: pnpm exec firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.json --project demo-vibe-rtc --only firestore "pnpm test:rules"
scripts.emulators: pnpm exec firebase emulators:start --config firebase.json --project demo-vibe-rtc
scripts.typecheck: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; for f in packages/*/tsconfig.json apps/*/tsconfig.json; do [ -f "$f" ] && pnpm exec tsc -p "$f" --noEmit; done'
